arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Antony REPLACEMENT, Gittens ‘SPECIAL INTEREST’, Cunha to ARSENAL
arts.sum: Football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano has provided an in-depth update on the market, with Manchester United set to move for an Antony replacement as Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool monitor top talents around Europe. Man Utd winger Antony is set to leave Old Trafford and Romano says the Old Trafford club will be active in the market to replace the Real Betis-bound winger.

Cole Palmer 'signs six-figure deal with Amazon to star in England documentary' as Three Lions target World Cup success
arts.sum: Filming has already started for the four-part series and it is set to be released in spring this year. Palmer was England's impact man off the bench at Euro 2024 scoring in the final.
